title: mc-test step file (.mctest.yml)
description: A semantic mc-test test authored once and run across the matrix: the capabilities it requires plus an ordered list of steps. This authoring schema is hand-maintained (the wire/method schemas in this dir are generated); register it in IntelliJ/VS Code for *.mctest.yml autocomplete + validation.

name.description: Test name (defaults to the file name).

target.description: A target ref, or the ${matrix} placeholder filled by the mc-test.yml row selected with --target.

requires.description: Capabilities the selected driver (plus any co-selected agents) MUST satisfy; otherwise the test is SKIPPED with a reason (never a false pass).

optional.description: Capabilities to use if available; never a cause to skip.

steps.description: Ordered steps. Each is a single-key mapping { <verb>: <args> }.

rendering.description: A real GPU/framebuffer client is present.

worldTruth.description: Read authoritative server world/block/entity state (server agent).

pluginState.description: Assert on plugin internal state via truth.assertPluginState (server agent).

fakePlayers.description: Spawn/despawn fake players (server agent + Carpet backend).

testIdTags.description: Target emits invisible testId tags the driver can resolve.

step.description: Exactly one step verb → its args.
